mapper.select: select * from notices order by create_time desc

select * from notices where visibility = 0 or (visibility = 1 and find_in_set(#{userType}, target_types)) or (visibility = 2 and json_contains(target_users, CAST(#{userId} AS CHAR))) order by create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into notices(title, content, visibility, target_types, target_users, admin_id) values(#{title}, #{content}, #{visibility}, #{targetTypes}, #{targetUsers}, #{adminId})
mapper.update: update notices set title = #{title}, content = #{content}, visibility = #{visibility}, target_types = #{targetTypes}, target_users = #{targetUsers}, update_time = now() where notice_id = #{noticeId}
